name: Strawberry Preserves
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss together berries and sugar in a 2 quart glass measure.
2. Let stand for 5 minutes.
3. Cover tightly with plastic wrap.
4. Cook at 100% for 10 minutes.
5. Uncover and stir well.
6. Re-cover and cook at 100% for 10 to 15 minutes longer, until very thick.
7. Remove from oven.
8. Uncover and stir in lemon juice.
